name: Australia Consumer Price Index (All Groups)
notes: ABS CPI dataflow — all-groups CPI index weighted avg of 8 capital cities. Verified live 2026-05-28 (101.7 @ 2026-Q1). Keyless SDMX-CSV.

name: Australia Real GDP (Chain Volume Measures)
notes: ABS ANA_AGG — GDP chain volume measures seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (693772 @ 2025-Q4).

name: Australia Real GDP Growth (QoQ)
notes: ABS ANA_AGG — GDP chain volume measures quarter-on-quarter %-change seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (0.8% @ 2025-Q4).

name: Australia Unemployment Rate
notes: ABS LF dataflow — unemployment rate persons aged 15+ seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (4.49% @ 2026-04).

name: Australia Labour Force Participation Rate
notes: ABS LF dataflow — participation rate persons aged 15+ seasonally adjusted. Verified live 2026-05-28 (66.7% @ 2026-04).
